customKeycodes.name: BT0
customKeycodes.title: BT0: tap to use, hold 5s to clear and pair

customKeycodes.name: NEXT_BT
customKeycodes.title: Next BT: use next Bluetooth slot

customKeycodes.title: Prev BT: use previous Bluetooth slot

customKeycodes.name: SWITCH
